fullArticle: Barsha Dutta has been covering the NFL since 2024, bringing a fresh and engaging perspective to the game. With Masters in Literature, she blends passion with insight, making football stories both relatable and exciting for readers. When she’s not writing about the gridiron, Barsha enjoys tending to her garden and immersing herself in the world of K-pop. She also occasionally covers entertainment and pop culture news. With her unique mix of interests, she connects sports fans to the NFL in a way that feels both personal and vibrant.Read More...
